title: Methodology Navigation Consolidation and Enterprise Information Design Polish

nav_consolidation_summary.previous_issue: The Methodology nav had too many top-level items and felt busy for executive review.

fade_scroll_removal_summary.auto_scroll_animation: Removed before this QA5 final state; no requestAnimationFrame or auto-scroll state remains in MethodologyWorkspace.
fade_scroll_removal_summary.gradient_fade_overlays: Removed strong Methodology nav edge fade pseudo-elements so first and last tabs are not covered.
fade_scroll_removal_summary.native_scrollbar: Hidden; nav is a responsive segmented grid with no visible native horizontal scrollbar.
fade_scroll_removal_summary.desktop_behavior: Six sections fit as a clean segmented control; narrow screens wrap instead of relying on moving navigation.

new_section_structure.overview: CFS at a Glance plus How CFS Works, model foundation, safe claims, and local readiness.
new_section_structure.capabilities: Current Capabilities grouped by Parcel Review, Planning Context, Constraints, and Governance.
new_section_structure.data_inventory: Grouped data-domain cards for parcel/tax, zoning/planning, permits, flood, schools, transportation, utility, model governance, and reporting.
new_section_structure.model_research: Internal Development Prediction Model Research with plain-English flow and hidden-output boundaries.
new_section_structure.data_needed: Priority 1 and Priority 2 official data request cards plus format guidance.
new_section_structure.roadmap_guardrails: Roadmap, in-progress items, What Not To Claim, safe demo wording, and Common Questions.

plain_english_flow_added: Parcel features describe context before development.
The model tests which conditions are associated with future new construction.
CFS reviews results at an aggregate level.
Parcel-level predictions stay hidden until data and calibration improve.

priority_1: WSACC true utility capacity / service areas / capacity constraints
official school enrollment and capacity by school
countywide future land use / small-area plan GIS
priority_2: planned local road projects with dates/status
data_needed_improvements.format_guidance: REST/GIS/table preferred. PDF-only is useful for reference but weaker for automated CFS integration.

visual_polish_changes: Reduced Methodology nav to six executive-friendly sections.
Changed nav from scroll-strip behavior to a stable responsive segmented grid.
Improved active-tab readability with subtle selected styling and accessible focus handling.
Reworked capability cards into grouped workflow sections with expandable details.
Renamed key headings to Current Capabilities, What Not To Claim, and Common Questions for clearer scanning.
Kept dark/glass enterprise styling while reducing nav clutter.

safety_verification.methodology_backend_fallback: If live model summary is unavailable, Methodology shows documented aggregate summary text instead of crashing or rendering blank.

validation_results.backend_validation: not run; backend files were not changed

browser_console.map_mode_caveat: ArcGIS terrain tile decode errors appeared while switching map-backed modes; this is external SceneView tile noise and not caused by the Methodology change.

remaining_known_issues: ArcGIS external terrain/basemap console noise can still appear when map-backed modes render.
Methodology content is now static and executive-friendly; future polish could add print/share anchors if requested.
